article_meta.title: — News —'Locked And Loaded': Trump Warns U.S

reasoning: The model flagged quoted source language as author bias and labeled outlet/source info as bias, while missing clear bias in the author’s prose. It also used invalid bias type labels not in the allowed set.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: It flagged Trump’s quoted statement as bias, an attribution violation.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Both flagged items are not genuine author-prose bias: one is a quote; the other is source metadata.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed author-level bias such as ‘rocked by… collapsing economy’ and ‘aggressive approach to Iran’.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-allowed labels (‘Loaded Language’, ‘Source Bias’) rather than valid types like Word Choice/Spin.
